planning_gate.spec_delta: M19 checks whether a contact-aware control-side wrapper can rescue exp103 before larger tracker redesign.

perspectives.product: answers whether the current G1 can squat in this stack before spending time on a larger tracker
perspectives.architecture: keeps exp103 policy frozen and isolates the controller/action-wrapper layer
perspectives.security: local MuJoCo/JAX evaluation only; no credentials
perspectives.qa: native exp29 visible gate per wrapper; browser replay only if native passes
perspectives.skeptic: post-policy action scaling may reduce depth faster than it restores contact/friction feasibility

dod: all wrapper variants write raw native JSON
best native rollout audited against exp29 visible gate
